settings__billing__cancel_confirm_body: Your access ends on {date}. You can resume any time before then.
settings__billing__resume_confirm_body: Your subscription will renew at the end of the current period.
settings__profile__subtitle: The couple behind the book. This is what guests see on the welcome screen and in any thank-you notes you send through Ovation.
settings__profile__your_account_descript: Just the fields that belong to you.
settings__profile__wedding_details_descr: Shown on your book's welcome screen and used to pace reminders.
settings__profile__wedding_details_no_ev: Create your event to set up wedding details and your public link.
settings__profile__localization_descript: Choose how Ovation reads and prices for you.
settings__profile__language_hint: Used across the Ovation app and your guest pages.
settings__profile__currency_hint: Used to display prices across the store, plans and checkout.
settings__profile__name_hint: Shown to your partner and on emails.
settings__profile__email_hint: Used to sign in. Email change isn't available yet.
settings__wedding__welcome_note_placehol: Hola! Bienvenue. Thanks for being part of this.
settings__couple_photo__section_descript: Shown on the polaroid at the top of your guest landing and submission pages.
settings__couple_photo__hint: JPG, PNG, WebP or HEIC. Up to 25 MB. Compressed before upload.
settings__notif__subtitle: Decide how often we email you and about what. We'll always send the essentials about your account.
settings__notif__alerts__desc: We email you when something needs your attention — new messages, kiosk issues, expiring keepsake credits.
settings__notif__digest__desc: A friendly summary of new messages, photos, and progress toward your wedding day.
settings__notif__marketing__desc: Occasional updates about new features, keepsakes, and seasonal offers. Unsubscribe anytime.
settings__danger__subtitle: Changes here can't be undone. We'll ask you to confirm before any deletion.
settings__danger__archive_description: Guests can no longer leave messages and the URL goes offline. You can un-archive anytime.
settings__danger__delete_book_descriptio: All messages, photos, transcripts and the Gold Book draft will be erased after 30 days. We recommend exporting your data first.
settings__danger__account_description: Deleting your account also deletes any books you solely own.
settings__danger__close_account_descript: All your books, messages, billing history, and devices will be removed. ({email})
settings__danger__close_account_confirm: Permanently close your account? This deletes any books you solely own.
settings__delete_modal__body: This will permanently erase all messages, audio, photos, and your Gold Book draft. This cannot be undone.
settings__delete_modal__warn_view: Guests will no longer be able to view or resubmit messages
settings__delete_modal__warn_url: Your {host}/{slug} URL will become available again
settings__delete_modal__warn_recovery: We keep your data for 30 days for recovery — after that, it's gone
settings__delete_modal__ack: I've exported my data and understand this is permanent.
settings__close_account_modal__body: This will permanently close your account and erase all books, messages, audio, photos, and Gold Book drafts tied to it. This cannot be undone.
settings__close_account_modal__warn_book: All books and guest messages will be permanently deleted
settings__close_account_modal__warn_emai: {email} will be released and can no longer access this account
settings__close_account_modal__warn_reco: We keep your data for 30 days for recovery — after that, it's gone
settings__close_account_modal__ack: I've exported my data and understand this is permanent.
settings__privacy__subtitle: Control who can see your book, who can leave messages, and who can see them. Defaults are private — change only what you want to open up.
settings__privacy__visibility__private__: Only you, your partner, and invited guests can see anything.
settings__privacy__visibility__unlisted_: Anyone with the link can view — but it won't appear in search.
settings__privacy__visibility__public__d: Discoverable in Ovation's gallery of wedding books (curated, opt-in).
settings__privacy__senders__invited__des: Only people who scanned a QR card you sent, or used your invite link.
settings__privacy__senders__anyone__desc: Useful if you're sharing over WhatsApp or Instagram.
settings__privacy__senders__signin__desc: Guests enter their email before leaving a message. Catches pranksters.
settings__privacy__review__before__desc: Every message waits in your queue until you approve it. Turn off for a more live feel.
settings__privacy__review__autopublish__: Messages from guests you tagged as 'family' skip the queue.
settings__privacy__what_guests__desc: Controls what a guest sees when they visit your public link.
settings__privacy__what_guests__count__d: A "142 messages from 88 guests" stat on the welcome screen.
settings__privacy__what_guests__others__: Lets guests browse what others left (after yours is recorded).
settings__privacy__what_guests__contribu: A read-only list. Only visible to co-owners by default.
settings__privacy__ai__transcribe__desc: We use on-device speech recognition. Transcripts never leave your book.
settings__privacy__ai__guest_see__desc: Guests can correct their own transcript before submitting.
settings__privacy__ai__suggestions__desc: Claude can propose thank-you notes and book layouts. Off means pure manual.
settings__data__all_events__desc: Pro tools — one workbook with every event you manage, one sheet per event.
settings__data__all_events__row_desc: Includes {count} events. Guests, contribution counts and media flags per attendee.
settings__data__per_event__desc: Everything below applies to the selected event.
settings__data__subtitle: Your messages belong to you. Download everything anytime — audio, transcripts, photos, metadata.
settings__data__hero__body: All messages, hours of audio, photos, full JSON metadata. Arrives in your email within 10 minutes.
settings__data__individual__pdf__desc: Your current Gold Book draft · print-ready 300 dpi
settings__data__individual__guests__desc: CSV with contact info + contribution status
settings__data__past__expiry_note: Download links expire after 7 days for your security.
settings__data__rights__desc: Under GDPR & CCPA. For requests on behalf of a deceased partner, contact support.
settings__data__rights__report__desc: A PDF summary of everything we know about you and your book. Takes up to 72 hours.
settings__data__rights__optout__title: Ask us to stop using your data for service improvement
settings__data__rights__optout__desc: We use anonymized patterns to tune transcription and layout. Opt out any time.
settings__billing__dre_cta_body: Your event data is deleted on {date} unless you keep it with Data Retention Extension. We'll email you before then with a checkout link. €20/month, billed only after your current storage expires.
settings__billing__dre_pending_body: DRE activation pending. We'll email you before {date} with a checkout link. If you don't complete checkout, your event data will be deleted on {date}.
